name: Sour Neon Worms
description: Juicy, fruit-flavored sour worms dusted with a tangy sugar coating. Experience a burst of sour then sweet in every single bite.
ingredients: Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Modified Corn Starch, Gelatin, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Fumaric Acid, Natural and Artificial Flavors.

reviews.comment: Absolutely delicious! The flavor is incredibly rich, and the packaging kept them perfectly fresh.
Great texture and amazing flavor. Shipping was super quick to Wellington.

name: Premium Dark Truffles
description: Rich Belgian dark chocolate truffles with a silky smooth chocolate ganache center, dusted with premium cocoa powder.
ingredients: Dark Chocolate, Cocoa Butter, Sugar, Heavy Cream, Cocoa Powder, Soy Lecithin, Natural Vanilla Flavor.

reviews.comment: My new favorite! Highly recommend for anyone looking for authentic quality treats.
Brought these for a family birthday and everyone loved them. Will definitely buy again.

name: Rainbow Carousel Lollipop
description: A classic gourmet swirl lollipop bursting with wild cherry and blue raspberry fruit flavors. Bright, colourful, and fun!
ingredients: Sugar, Corn Syrup, Citric Acid, Natural Cherry Flavor, Artificial Colors (Red 40, Blue 1, Yellow 5).

reviews.comment: Great texture and amazing flavor. Shipping was super quick to Wellington.
Very tasty! A bit sweet for my preference, but the kids devoured them in minutes.
